headline: AI Engineering Daily Command Brief
intro: Use this feed to power deterministic daily updates without any LLM calls.
block1_paragraph: Define SLOs and runbooks for latency error budgets and fallback paths in AI endpoints.
block1_callout: Action: Add one runbook update per incident class.
block2_paragraph: Track regression with fixed eval sets and compare prompt/model versions by exact metrics.
block2_callout: Action: Maintain a weekly benchmark snapshot.
block3_paragraph: Cap max tokens use cached context and add endpoint-specific retry budgets to avoid spend spikes.
block3_callout: Action: Publish daily token spend by endpoint.

headline: System Design Daily Digest
intro: Focus on architecture decisions that improve reliability and maintainability.
block1_paragraph: Apply timeout retry and idempotency contracts for each write path with explicit failure modes.
block1_callout: Action: Add idempotency key support to one critical route.
block2_paragraph: Attach request IDs to every stage retrieval generation and tool execution for traceability.
block2_callout: Action: Enforce request-id in all structured logs.
block3_paragraph: Use fail-closed auth security headers and least-privilege secrets handling in every deployment.
block3_callout: Action: Verify no public routes bypass auth middleware.

headline: Failure Mode Explorer Daily
intro: Document and mitigate real failure classes from operations history.
block1_paragraph: Partition system and user context and sanitize untrusted inputs before model prompts.
block1_callout: Action: Add injection test cases to CI.
block2_paragraph: Separate retrieval refresh cadence from model deployment cadence to prevent stale answers.
block2_callout: Action: Define freshness SLO per data source.
block3_paragraph: For each critical dependency define fallback behavior and an automated health-check threshold.
block3_callout: Action: Simulate one dependency outage this week.
